John Hadaway About Projects About  Projects  Twitter↗︎  Linkedin↗︎  Email↗︎ 

My name is John Holopainen Hadaway (b. 1998). I am primarily interested in how we collaborate and co-exist, in how we live together better. I aim to make things that make it easier for us to cooperate across diversity and pool resources and knowledge towards common goals.

Currently, I am making ourchive, exploring, and resting before my civil service. Prior, I worked in urban analysis and development, research, strategy, and design, and studied history at the University of Chicago and, for a brief period, architecture at the Architectural Association. At work, I am a generalist, skilled in programming, spatial data analysis, design and visualisation, and writing.

Before all of that, I was born into a rootless, nomadic childhood, lovingly unsettled in Jakarta, Manila, Cebu City, Moscow, and Almaty. I have since lived in Chicago, London, Montpellier, and Helsinki, where I am currently based. In my logged off hours, I like to write, play, and rest.

If any of the above interests you, I would love to get in touch for any (or no) reason. Here is my CV and portfolio. And here is my blog.
